title: About Me!
text:
Club Involvement

SEEDS club
I joined the SEEDS club this quarter and was lucky to join their trip to the Sierra Nevada Aquatic Research Lab . They also recently held a cynotyping event that was a a lot of fun!






UCSB SEEDS







Convict Lake







Panorama Dome








Hobbies
In my limited free time, I enjoy cooking, baking, crafting, and doing art. My favorite thing to cook/make is probably spring rolls. Click through the images below to scroll through some of my favorite creations.






Paintings







Crafts







Cooking & Baking









Group photo of UCSB’s chapter of SEEDS (Strategies for Ecological Education, Diversity, and Sustainability) club at the Sierra Nevada Aquatic Research Labratory.


On our first day of the trip we visited Convit Lake. We collected plant samples for pressing and documented our findings on the inaturalist app. It went from cool and sunny to snowing sideways.


On the second day of the trip we went on a hike at Panorama Dome led by a naturalist. We learned about the different types of plant growth caused by differing conditions on the North and South side of the mountains.


Watercolor Birds of Paradise Plant


Crocheted basket


Strawberry Topped Cheesecake

title: Jocelyn Magner
text: Hello! My name is Jocelyn Magner. I am a third-year transfer student at the University of California, Santa Barbara. I am currently working on my B.S. in Environmental Studies and Geography. This website is my personal portfolio, showcasing my academic and professional achievements, as well as my personal hobbies and travels. Feel free to explore!
